response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content and determined it is a promotional trailer for the 'AZKi 8th Birthday Live Crossover' event. 2. Identified the content as a fast-paced compilation/mashup of many different songs, not a single complete vocal performance. 3. Confirmed via web search that this is a promotional video for the event, not a specific track with searchable lyrics. 4. Due to the nature of the mashup, concluded that providing full lyrics is not possible and structured the JSON to reflect this.
response.global_summary: This video is a promotional trailer for the "AZKi 8th Birthday Live Crossover" event. It features a fast-paced montage of various Hololive VTubers singing snippets of multiple anime songs from the Heisei and Reiwa eras. Because it is a promotional mashup rather than a performance of a single song, it is not possible to provide full lyrics.

scenes.description: A fast-paced promotional montage featuring various Hololive VTubers singing short snippets of anime songs representing the 'Heisei' and 'Reiwa' eras, titled 'AZKi 8th Birthday Live Crossover'.
The video concludes with a promotional outro screen displaying event titles and logos.
